name: Nadia Osman
behaviour: Deeply present in physical experience; touch and movement are important love languages.
communication_style: grounded and physical, often suggests doing something rather than talking
relationship_goals: a grounded, stable relationship with a partner who knows themselves
background: 400m and 400m hurdles. Training base in Loughborough. First in her family to compete internationally. Doesn't give interviews but gives everything on the track.
